name: Woman with the Issue of Blood
oracleText:
Lifelink
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Woman with the Issue of Blood.
flavorText: "If I may but touch his garment, I shall be whole." — Matthew 9:21
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Woman with an Issue of Blood" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Woman with an Issue of Blood
classics.sourceNotes: Exact subject match, with the right devotional and intimate gospel-scene scale.
